summaries.title: VPS RAM Orchestrator Worker — multi-layer RAM pressure management with worker pausing and task deferral
summaries.summary: The VPS RAM Orchestrator Worker implements multi-layer RAM pressure management by separating sensing (RAMMonitor), policy (RAMScheduler), and actuation (WorkerPauseManager) into independent modules. It uses a 4-state state machine with hysteresis to prevent oscillation and worker criticality levels for graceful degradation under increasing RAM pressure. Key takeaway: always decouple sensing, policy, and actuation in resource management systems, and use state machines with hysteresis and granular criticality levels instead of binary on/off controls.

summaries.title: MCP server local_json_fallback silently drops lesson data — withFallback() must detect it
summaries.summary: The MCP server at port 3419 proxies hermes_learn to Central Brain daemon (3417) and REST API (8787), but both were unreachable. The MCP server's _proxyWithFallback fell through to _handleLocalFallback which returns success:true with source:local_json_fallback — the lesson data was silently dropped. Fixed by detecting local_json_fallback in withFallback() and falling through to local storage + retry queue. Key takeaway: never trust success:true from an upstream component — always inspect the source field to verify data was actually persisted.
